name: Bienenstich
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 oz (100g) cottage cheese, well pressed out
recipeInstructions:
For the Pastry: Mix the cottage cheese with milk, oil, sugar, and salt. Gradually add flour and baking powder mixture until dough is slightly sticky. Knead remaining flour into dough. Grease a 10 in round cake tin, roll out pastry to fit base.
For the Topping: Melt butter, sugar, and vanillin sugar; stir in milk; mix in almonds. Set aside to cool. If firm when cold, add more milk. Spread evenly over pastry.
Oven: Moderately hot
Baking time: About 20 minutes
Alternatively, fill with buttercream made from half packet Oetker Pudding Powder, vanilla flavor, 2 well heaped tbsp sugar, 1/2 pint cold milk, and 3 1/2 oz butter. When cake is cool, cut horizontally into two halves; spread filling on bottom half; place top half on top.
